sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ فَارُوقٌ حَجَرًا مُلَوَّنًا فِي الطَّرِيقِ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Farouk je pronašao šareni kamen na putu do škole.
sentences.translationEn: Farouk found a colourful stone on the way to school.

sentences.translation: Na njemu su bili mali lijepi crteži.
sentences.translationEn: It had small beautiful drawings on it.

sentences.translation: Odneo ga je u školu i pokazao ga prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: He took it to school and showed it to his friends.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْمُعَلِّمَةُ: هَذَا حَجَرٌ دَهَنَهُ طِفْلٌ وَتَرَكَهُ لِيُسَعِدَ شَخْصًا.
sentences.translation: Učiteljica je rekla: Ovo je kamen koji je obojilo dijete i ostavilo ga da usreći nekoga.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher said: This is a stone a child painted and left to make someone happy.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ فَارُوقٌ أَنْ يَصْنَعَ حَجَرًا مُلَوَّنًا وَيَتْرُكَهُ لِشَخْصٍ آخَرَ.
sentences.translation: Farouk je odlučio da napravi šareni kamen i ostavi ga drugoj osobi.
sentences.translationEn: Farouk decided to make a colourful stone and leave it for someone else.
